posts.author: VintageFix_Steve
posts.text: URGENT: A customer just tried to send a payment of £450 via an unlinked portal claiming it was a deposit for a rare vacuum cleaner part I listed yesterday. They said the system requires immediate verification to release funds. This feels wrong as I usually use the app directly. Please check if this is real before anyone tries to contact me!
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation because a longstanding seller account is making a suspicious urgent payment request that could indicate account takeover.
